info.title: K10 Bot API
info.description: API for controlling UniHiker K10 Robot with sensors, servos, camera, and more

tags.name: Sensors
tags.description: K10 sensor readings (light, temperature, humidity, accelerometer)

tags.name: Logs
tags.description: Rolling logger service for debug and application logs

tags.name: AmakerBot
tags.description: Master controller registration, heartbeat, and display control

x-service-settings-pattern: Each service that implements settings persistence automatically gets two routes: /{service}/saveSettings (GET) to save current settings, and /{service}/loadSettings (GET) to load persisted settings. These routes are not individually documented below but follow a standard pattern.
x-service-status-pattern: Some services expose a /serviceStatus (GET) route that returns the current service state (started, stopped, initialized, etc.).

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive board information including system metrics, memory usage, chip details, and firmware version

freeStackBytes.description: Free stack space for current task

get.description: Retrieves all K10 sensor readings including light, temperature, humidity, microphone, and accelerometer data
Retrieves all log entries from debug, app_info, and ESP-IDF loggers
Retrieves log entries from the debug logger only
Retrieves log entries from the app_info logger only
Retrieves log entries from the ESP-IDF logger only
Retrieves debug logger entries in JSON format
Retrieves debug logger entries in plain text format (LEVEL: message)

INFO: System initialized
DEBUG: Service started

Returns UDP listening port, message statistics, and recent messages

dropped.description: Number of packets dropped due to buffer lock

error.description: Error message if buffer is locked

get.description: Get OpenAPI 3.0.0 specification for all registered services including paths, parameters, request bodies, and response schemas
Captures and returns a JPEG image from the camera

503.description: Camera not initialized or service not started

put.description: Updates camera settings such as quality, framesize, brightness, contrast, and saturation

503.description: Camera not initialized or service not started

get.description: Returns a continuous MJPEG video stream

503.description: Camera not initialized or service not started

post.description: Stop the camera service (useful before changing framesize)
Start the camera service (applies saved framesize from preferences)
Set servo angle for angular servos (180° or 270°)

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: Angle in degrees (0-180 for 180° servos, 0-270 for 270° servos)

503.description: Service not initialized or not started

post.description: Set continuous servo speed for a single rotational servo. Optional `duration_ms` auto-stops the servo after the given number of milliseconds.

duration_ms.description: Optional auto-stop delay in ms. The servo is stopped automatically after this many ms. Omit or set 0 for no timeout.

503.description: Service not initialized or not started

post.description: Set the same speed on all attached rotational servos. Optional `duration_ms` auto-stops all of them after the given number of milliseconds.

duration_ms.description: Optional auto-stop delay in ms applied to every servo. Omit or set 0 for no timeout.

503.description: Service not initialized or not started

post.description: Set speed for multiple rotational servos in a single request. Each entry may optionally include `duration_ms` for an independent per-servo auto-stop timer.

duration_ms.description: Optional per-servo auto-stop delay in ms.

503.description: Service not initialized or not started

post.description: Stop all servos by setting speed to 0

503.description: Service not initialized or not started

post.description: Play built-in melody with playback options. Query parameters: melody (required, 0-19), option (optional, 1=Once, 2=Forever, 4=OnceInBackground, 8=ForeverInBackground)
Play a tone at specified frequency and duration. Query parameters: freq (required, Hz), beat (optional, default 8000)
Get list of available built-in melodies
Set servo angle on DFR1216 expansion board

503.description: Service not initialized or not started

post.description: Set motor speed on DFR1216 expansion board

503.description: Service not initialized or not started

get.description: Retrieve a single setting value or all settings in a domain

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Settings domain/namespace (max 15 chars, alphanumeric and underscore)

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Setting key (max 15 chars, alphanumeric and underscore)

post.description: Update or insert setting. Use query parameters.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Settings domain/namespace (max 15 chars, alphanumeric and underscore)

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Setting key for single update (max 15 chars)

503.description: Operation failed or service not started

post.description: Register the calling client as the master controller. Requires the server-generated token shown in MODE_APP_LOG.
Unregister the current master. Only the registered master IP can call this.

403.description: Not authorized: caller is not the master

get.description: Return the IP address and registration status of the current master controller.
Retrieve the server-generated token required for master registration.

post.description: Set TFT display mode directly. Accepted values: APP_UI, APP_LOG, DEBUG_LOG, ESP_LOG.
Cycle TFT display to next mode (same as pressing button A). Order: APP_UI → APP_LOG → DEBUG_LOG → ESP_LOG → APP_UI.
